zh.Neville's Cross, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯
zh.Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Herle於1295年出生在英國瓦維其可爾時，她的父親William de Herle26歲，母親Katherine de Beauchamp17歲。她於大約1321年與Ralph Hastings在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她於1329年住在英國越可爾科比。她去世於1364年之後。

zh-hans.Neville's Cross, Durham, England: 英国達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯
zh-hans.Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Herle于1295年出生在英国瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲William de Herle26岁，母亲Katherine de Beauchamp17岁。她于大约1321年与Ralph Hastings在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她于1329年住在英国越可爾科比。她去世于1364年之后。

nameMeanings.name: Herle

South German and Swiss German: from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with ēra ‘honor’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Herle was born in 1295, in Warwickshire, England, her father, William de Herle, was 26 and her mother, Katherine de Beauchamp, was 17. She married Ralph Hastings about 1321, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She lived in Kirby, Yorkshire, England in 1329. She died after 1364.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Herle est née en 1295, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Herle, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Katherine de Beauchamp, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph Hastings environ 1321, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle a vécu à Kirby, Everwyck, Angleterre en 1329. Elle est décédée après 1364.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Herle 1295 in Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Herle 26 und ihre Mutter Katherine de Beauchamp 17. Sie hat um 1321 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Ralph Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1329 hat sie in Kirby, Yorkshire, England gelebt. Sie starb nach 1364.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Herle è nata il nel 1295 nel Warwickshire, England, sua padre, William de Herle, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Katherine de Beauchamp, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Ralph Hastings circa 1321, nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Vissuto a Kirby, Yorkshire, England nel 1329. Morì dopo il 1364.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Herleが1295年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Herleは26歳，母Katherine de Beauchampは17歳であった。約1321年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでRalph Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1329年にはイギリスヨークシュアイアキルビーに住んでいた。彼女は1364年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Herle(이)가 1295년 영국 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Herle(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine de Beauchamp(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1321년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 Ralph Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1329년도에 영국 요르크실르 커비에서 살았다. 그녀는 1364년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Herle nasceu em 1295, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Herle, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Katherine de Beauchamp, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph Hastings aproximadamente 1321, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela viveu em Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra em 1329. Ela faleceu após 1364.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Herle родилась в 1295 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Herle было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine de Beauchamp, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Hastings около 1321 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она жила в местности кирби, еркшир, Англия в 1329 году. Она умерла после 1364 г.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Herle nació en 1295, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Herle, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Katherine de Beauchamp, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Ralph Hastings aproximadamente 1321, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Vivió en Kirby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra en 1329. Murió después de 1364.
